message:
fix: extend Bug #167 FK guard to sources table within batch transaction

Adds ensure_sources_in_tx alongside the existing ensure_agents_in_tx and
ensure_workspaces_in_tx guards.  The source_id is a TEXT FK on the
conversations table and can suffer the same stale-snapshot problem where
autocommit writes from ensure_source are not visible inside the batch
transaction.

The function checks each unique source_id, determines the kind
(local vs ssh) from the source_id value, and creates a stub row via
INSERT OR IGNORE if it's missing from the transaction snapshot.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
